title: SOL 6x Cotton String Balls 150m - Kitchen Twine for Meat, Gift Wrapping & Butchers String - Durable White Macrame Cord for Cooking, Parcel Tying, DIY Projects & Crafts
features: Ideal for DIY Arts & Crafts - This white string is perfect for jewellery making, knotting, binding, and so much more. It's a must-have for any crafter or DIY enthusiast and a versatile kitchen string & butchers twine
Versatile Use - Doesn't matter if you're using it to wrap up some meat or doing DIY projects, this string will get the job done
Strong Hold - This ball of string is strong enough to hold its shape and stay securely in place, making it suitable for a wide range of projects and applications.
Made from Soft Material - The single twist construction of the macrame cord gives a smooth, supple texture that's easy to work with and comfortable to handle.
Easy to Cut - The string is easy to cut to the desired length, making it perfect for projects of all sizes.

This versatile string is perfect for DIY arts and crafts, jewellery making, knotting, binding, cooking, and gift wrapping. Is this string strong enough for heavy-duty use? Yes, the strong hold of this string ensures it maintains its shape and stays securely in place for a wide range of projects. What material is the string made from? The string is made from soft cotton with a single twist construction, providing a smooth, supple texture that's easy to work with. Can I cut the string to any length? Absolutely, this string is easy to cut to your desired length, making it suitable for projects of all sizes. How long is the total length of the string in the pack? The pack includes a total length of 150 metres, giving you plenty of string for multiple uses and projects
